articles.title: New NHS drug offers ovarian cancer patients more time and better quality of life
articles.description: Women taking the drug, which is kinder on the body, tell the BBC it has given them their lives back.

articles.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
articles.description: The countries reject "any attempt, by any state or non-state actor, to hold Lebanon's future hostage", the US State Department says.

articles.title: US House votes to rein in Trump's war powers in rebuke over Iran
articles.description: In the 215-208 vote, four Republicans joined Democrats to pass the measure, which had failed in three previous attempts.

articles.title: NHS staff should be banned from wearing pro-Palestinian badges, report recommends
articles.description: The recommendation is one of several from Lord Mann, whose review examined antisemitism within the organisation.
